segments.text: In this situation, won't attack recklessly
segments.original_text: この状況さあなおちゃ選手安易に攻めることはない

segments.text: Gotta hold that banana down tight to extend the combo
segments.original_text: バナナをしっかり持ってコンボを伸ばしたい

segments.text: Lost the minecart off-stage, so stuck here
segments.original_text: 崖外に出したトロッコがないのでここ

full_text: In this situation, won't attack recklessly Gotta hold that banana down tight to extend the combo Lost the minecart off-stage, so stuck here
